sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49098" key="qreyi/ppas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρεψίππας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱπποτρόφος</foreign>, as pr. n. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:7:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.8</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
